user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Roots Flagship Store
fields.description: Flagship Roots store for Canadian apparel and gift items—great for picking up cozy souvenirs like toques, scarves, and leather goods before your flight.

insertion_point.reasoning: User requested a souvenir stop before the CN Tower on Day 10 morning. Placing this POI at position 0 ensures it occurs before the CN Tower and gives time to buy gifts before departure.
